channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT Releases This Week in Australia
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in Australia — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: Ransom Canyon — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 7.1 · Worth a watch — Passions run deep in a small Texas town, as three ranching dynasties fight for their land, their legacies and the people they love.

item.title: Masters of the Universe — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · English · ★ 7.3 · Worth a watch — After being separated for 15 years, the Sword of Power leads Prince Adam back to Eternia, where he discovers his home shattered under the fiendish rule of…

item.title: Star Trek: Strange New Worlds — Paramount Plus
item.description: Paramount Plus · English · ★ 8.0 · Must watch — Follow Captain Christopher Pike, Science Officer Spock and Number One in the years before Captain Kirk boarded the U.S.S.

item.title: Descendants: Wicked Wonderland — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 7.8 · Must watch — Now that the Queen of Hearts is nice and Cinderella is safe, things seem perfect for Red and Chloe… But little do they know that changing the past created a…

item.title: Heartstopper Forever — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 7.2 · Worth a watch — It's a new school year for the Truham-Higgs gang. As Nick and Charlie's relationship deepens, their thoughts turn to life after the last bell rings.

item.title: Lucky — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 7.0 · Worth a watch — When a multi-million-dollar heist goes sideways, con artist Lucky is forced to go on the run. Pursued by both the FBI and a ruthless crime boss, Lucky must…

item.title: The Odyssey — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.9 · Must watch — Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.

item.title: Moana — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 5.8 · Decent one-time watch — Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable…

item.title: Evil Dead Burn — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.8 · Worth a watch — After her husband's abrupt death, Alice seeks solace with his remaining family — descendants of a leading researcher on demonic possession.

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Silo — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: X-Men '97 — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…

item.title: The Invite — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.8 · Must watch — Joe and Angela's marriage is on thin ice. When they invite their enigmatic upstairs neighbors for a dinner party, the night spirals into unexpected places.

item.title: House of the Dragon — Foxtel Now
item.description: Foxtel Now · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: Detective Conan: Fallen Angel of the Highway — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Japanese · Just released — verdict soon — When a string of deadly highway incidents begin, Conan Edogawa's investigations point towards an orchestrated plot rather than mere accidents.

item.title: The Wizard of the Kremlin — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · French · ★ 6.5 · Worth a watch — In the chaos of post-Soviet Russia, rising KGB officer Vladimir Putin joins forces with master manipulator Vadim Baranov to reshape life behind the Iron…

item.title: Colours of Time — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · French · ★ 7.3 · Worth a watch — United by the unexpected inheritance of a house in Normandy, four estranged cousins discover their family history by retracing their ancestor's steps.
